---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for AethelDB
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and what's missing or hard today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. If it touches a subsystem, note which
(`proxy` / `safekeeper` / `pageserver` / `compute`).

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches, and why this one.

## Additional context

Links, prior art (e.g. how Neon/PostgreSQL handle it), or a design sketch.
